docket_entries.description: MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $12,500.00 FILED BY COLINDRES, ELMER DBA MY SOLUTION IN AS TO DEFENDANT HRVATIN, ADRIANO ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR MAY-06-2024 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 506
